contentPattern.structure: image + overlaid two-line label (grey category over white title)

suitableFor: image tiles that need a category label AND a title overlaid
notSuitableFor: tiles with a single overlaid category label only (use cards-portfolio)
cards with body text below the image

differencesFromBase: cards-portfolio renders one overlaid text line (linked category) at top-left; this variant renders two overlaid lines (grey category + white title) at bottom-left with a bottom gradient, and tiles are not links.
